description: Tier 3 — normalized intent classification. Grades classifyIntent (enrichment → normalized legacy label → keyword fallback) against hand-labeled normalized intents (labeled from the record content, not the dataset's coarse legacy labels). With the committed enrichment present it grades the offline LLM layer; without it, the deterministic legacy-map + keyword fallback. Deterministic: no LLM, no API key, CI-gated.

cases.description: Carrier states availability ('available Box Truck. Load #...') → availability_check. Enrichment refines the coarse legacy 'inquiry' label.
Carrier asks to confirm weight before dispatch → load_details. Enrichment refines the coarse legacy 'info' label.
Legacy 'terse'; a bare 'What does it pay?' with no counter is general_inquiry per the taxonomy. Enrichment classifies it directly (the keyword fallback is exercised in unit tests instead).
Call type rate_negotiation maps straight through.
